channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nadine Dorries compares Jackie Kennedy and Carolyn Bessette’s lasting cultural impact
item.description: In her column, Nadine Dorries reflects on the enduring fascination with Jackie Kennedy and Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy, two women linked by the Kennedy legacy but representing different eras and ideals o...

item.title: England introduces new unified recycling and food waste collection rules
item.description: From 31 March 2026, England begins implementing nationwide reforms to simplify and standardise household rubbish and recycling collections. Under the new 'Simpler Recycling' legislation, every council...

item.title: Roberto De Zerbi close to joining Tottenham as Thomas Tuchel defends Arsenal player absences
item.description: Roberto De Zerbi is nearing an agreement to become Tottenham Hotspur’s new head coach after talks reached an advanced stage. Initially hesitant to take on the challenge before the summer, the 46-year-...

item.title: Alceon’s Private Equity Unit Secures $60m Towards $100m Co-Investment Fund
item.description: Alceon’s private equity arm has launched a new co-investment fund, aiming to raise up to $100 million to invest in founder-led businesses within the lower mid-market. According to a fundraising deck s...

item.title: McKenzie says he will resign if suspended amid allegations from inmate
item.description: Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture, Gayton McKenzie, has publicly stated he is prepared to resign from his ministerial post should President Cyril Ramaphosa suspend him in light of allegations made b...

item.title: Investigation Underway After Woman Allegedly Assaulted in Rawat Area
item.description: RAWALPINDI: In a disturbing incident near Rawat, a 19-year-old woman was allegedly gang-raped by four men while travelling in a moving van. According to the FIR lodged by the victim’s mother, the woma...

item.title: Understanding Humanity and Identity in Kafka’s ‘The Metamorphosis’
item.description: This article examines Franz Kafka’s novella ‘The Metamorphosis,’ a story about Gregor Samsa who wakes up one morning to find himself turned into a giant insect. The piece explores how Gregor’s identit...

item.title: How to Check and Download Rajasthan Board Class 12 Results 2026
item.description: The Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education (RBSE) 12th class results for the year 2026 are expected to be announced soon. Students and parents are advised to stay updated through official channels, as...

item.title: Economist argues fuel excise cut can ease inflation pressures
item.description: Economist and journalist Jason Murphy has written a reflective piece explaining why he has shifted his stance on fuel excise cuts. Traditionally, economists argue against cutting fuel excise taxes bec...

item.title: How Parenthood Affects Partner Behavior: Stories from Mothers
item.description: The transition to parenthood can dramatically alter the dynamics in a relationship, sometimes revealing both the best and worst in partners. BuzzFeed collected 23 accounts from women sharing how their...

item.title: Concerning trends in government decision-making and public accountability
item.description: The article by Macharia Gaitho raises serious concerns about the conduct of Kenya's political and bureaucratic leadership. Recent government actions suggest increasing instances of overreach and poor ...

item.title: Police Corporal and Companion Killed in Early-Morning Ambush in Saguiaran, Lanao del Sur
item.description: COTABATO CITY — Before dawn on Saturday, March 28, a police corporal and his male civilian companion were ambushed and killed in Barangay Paglamatan, Saguiaran, Lanao del Sur. The victims, identified ...

item.title: Police Hunt Women Suspected of Drugging and Robbing Man in Kilimani Apartment
item.description: Police in Nairobi are searching for two women accused of drugging and robbing a man of valuables worth about KSh 335,000 and an additional KSh 140,000 in cash at his Kilimani home. According to a repo...

item.title: Africa’s digital readiness gap widens amid global instability
item.description: The article by Glodine Makapela argues that while Africa and the rest of the world remain fixated on armed conflicts and political crises, the deeper transformation reshaping societies is digital. Ben...

item.title: Teachers oppose government proposal for compulsory Year 8 reading tests in England
item.description: At its annual conference in Brighton, the National Education Union (NEU) voted to reject government proposals to introduce a compulsory reading test for Year 8 pupils in England. The government intend...

item.title: Domestic Workers in South Africa Face Low Wages and Poor Living Conditions
item.description: A recent Human Rights Festival held at Constitutional Hill in South Africa has drawn attention to the ongoing struggles faced by domestic workers. Many of these workers are underpaid, overworked, and ...

item.title: Strengthening Women’s Economic Role for Inclusive Growth in Kenya
item.description: Women form the backbone of Kenya’s economy, contributing across agriculture, entrepreneurship, formal jobs, and unpaid domestic work. Despite this, many women still face barriers that limit their full...

item.title: US–Iran tensions rise as Trump signals possible military action amid Middle East unrest
item.description: As escalating tensions rock the Middle East, the United States has significantly increased its military presence in the region, deploying thousands of soldiers and marines. Iran, in response, has accu...

item.title: How to spot red flags in a new romantic relationship
item.description: Late-night research by a friend revealed how rushing into romance can lead to risky situations. Anne had just met a man who seemed very charming, but she felt uneasy because he was moving too quickly,...

item.title: European Businesses Pledge Continued Investment and Partnership in Tanzania
item.description: European investors don promise to continue strengthening their trade and investment links with Tanzania. The statement was made during the 10-year anniversary of the European Business Group Tanzania (...
